items.title: French Open increases total purse to $72.1 million
items.summary: The prize money for the French Open has increased by about 10% for an overall pot of 61.7 million euros ($72.1 million), organizers said.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: After Real Madrid's UCL comeback falls short, can their project be salvaged?
items.summary: Big questions lie ahead for Real Madrid following their defeat to Bayern Munich in an instant UCL classic.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Curry and Green roll back the years to keep Warriors’ season alive: ‘For one night, we’re us’
